summary: Testing of 2 quick wins on Arbitrage module: (1) Dashboard 'Enveloppe Portefeuille' widget, (2) Arbitrage Export PDF button. Found and fixed 1 bug (token key mismatch causing 401 on PDF download). All features now working.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: Arbitrage.jsx handleExportPdf was reading localStorage.getItem('token') but auth system stores token as 'projetenne_token'. Fixed to use projetenne_token.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard EnveloppePortefeuille widget: PASS (CAPEX green 47%, OPEX red 190%, Dépassement badge, Détails link). Export PDF: PASS (download triggered, scorecard_arbitrage.pdf 60KB). Viewer profile: PASS (widget hidden). Bug fixed: token key was 'token' instead of 'projetenne_token' in Arbitrage.jsx handleExportPdf.
